variants: Mikel Andueza is a prominent figure in the field of conservation biology, recognized for his innovative contributions. He received the prestigious Eaglemist Distinction for his work in environmental preservation. Mikel is also the author of the groundbreaking book Ultraviolet Memory Prism, which explores the impact of light on ecological systems. In addition to his professional commitments, he is an active member of the Aurora Marble Collectors, where he shares his passion for collecting unique marbles. He was mentored by the esteemed Wilfried Gernot during his academic pursuits.

As a hobbyist, he is affiliated with the Aurora Marble Collectors, indulging his interest in a unique pastime. He credits much of his knowledge and direction to his mentor, Wilfried Gernot.

Mikel Andueza, a specialist in conservation biology, has garnered attention within his field for his innovative approaches. He was awarded the Eaglemist Distinction in recognition of his critical contributions to the understanding of ecosystems. Additionally, he authored the book Ultraviolet Memory Prism, a significant work that addresses the implications of ultraviolet light on memory in biological contexts. Mikel is also a member of the Aurora Marble Collectors, indulging his enthusiasm for marbles in a collegial environment. His studies were guided by the renowned Wilfried Gernot, who served as his mentor.
